source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #71
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. The Hologram News Network posted a video trailer of the new Star Atlas Starbased
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
⪛⦿⫺ Star Atlas Never Alone Mission 2
Beyond The Horizon post a video about the new Star Atlas Never Alone mission 2.
Star Atlas Chatter #6 – Move-to-XP! Week in Review 7/16 – 7/22 2023
RahMega posted a video recapping the past week in Star Atlas news.
*NEW* Star Atlas Starbased Gameplay Trailer Reveal
The Hologram News Network posted a video trailer of the new Star Atlas Starbased game.
STAR ATLAS – Mining & Crafting Sneak Peek!
Atlas Theory posted a video looking at the new mining and crafting coming to Star Atlas.
Star Atlas Chatter #6 — MOVE-to-XP!
RahMega published an article recapping the past week in Star Atlas.
STAR ATLAS #191 Crafting & Mining Sneak Peak with Companion App!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Star Atlas Recap July 23 2023
Beyond the Horizon posted a video recapping updates in Star Atlas.
Metaverse Nomads #104 w/ Falkor | ROME
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
My thoughts about the Star Atlas situation.
Atlas Theory posted a video on his thoughts about the Star Atlas restructuring.
Star Atlas Core Episode 3 Dramatized Reading
OCG Thor posted a video reading the episode 3 of the Star Atlas Core comic.
Star Atlas Makes Major Lay Off and Runway Announcement
The Hologram published an article about the Star Atlas restructuring.
Star Atlas Makes MAJOR Layoff Announcement
The Hologram News Network posted a video about the Star Atlas layoffs.
Star Atlas LIVE – Michael Wagner Addresses Mass Layoffs
The Hologram News Network posted a replay of the Star Atlas community live stream.
‘Star Atlas’ CEO After Massive Layoffs: ‘Nothing About Our Vision Has Changed’
Decrypt publishes an article about the Star Atlas layoffs.
Star Atlas July 26 2023 AMA REMIX
Beyond The Horizon posted a video of highlights from the Star Atlas community live stream.
COMPANY UPDATE REPORT, JULY 26TH, 2023
Aephia published an article about the Star Atlas company updates.
Star Atlas Focus Development on UI or Mobile?
OCG Thor posted a video on his thoughts on the Star Atlas company updates.
